data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for version control and change tracking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the version control and change tracking feature, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for version control and change tracking, yet there is no supporting evidence to demonstrate that these features are implemented or operational. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of version control and change tracking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the version control and change tracking requirement.
